'''鈭歡-f-v''' ('''kagafav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hilite|hilite]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hilite|hilite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-f-v
|-
! Lemma
| kagafav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigafav|thigafav]] || [[word:jigafav|jigafav]] || [[word:shigafav|shigafav]] || [[word:kigafav|kigafav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugafav|thuthugafav]] || [[word:jujugafav|jujugafav]] || [[word:shushugafav|shushugafav]] || [[word:kukugafav|kukugafav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugafav|thugafav]] || [[word:jugafav|jugafav]] || [[word:shugafav|shugafav]] || [[word:kugafav|kugafav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugafav|thugafav]] || [[word:jugafav|jugafav]] || [[word:shugafav|shugafav]] || [[word:kugafav|kugafav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegafav|thegafav]] || [[word:jegafav|jegafav]] || [[word:shegafav|shegafav]] || [[word:kegafav|kegafav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogafav|thothogafav]] || [[word:jojogafav|jojogafav]] || [[word:shoshogafav|shoshogafav]] || [[word:kokogafav|kokogafav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogafav|thogafav]] || [[word:jogafav|jogafav]] || [[word:shogafav|shogafav]] || [[word:kogafav|kogafav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogafav|thogafav]] || [[word:jogafav|jogafav]] || [[word:shogafav|shogafav]] || [[word:kogafav|kogafav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]] || [[word:gafav|gafav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gafav|th忙gafav]] || [[word:j忙gafav|j忙gafav]] || [[word:sh忙gafav|sh忙gafav]] || [[word:k忙gafav|k忙gafav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagafav|thathagafav]] || [[word:jajagafav|jajagafav]] || [[word:shashagafav|shashagafav]] || [[word:kakagafav|kakagafav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagafav|thagafav]] || [[word:jagafav|jagafav]] || [[word:shagafav|shagafav]] || [[word:kagafav|kagafav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagafav|thagafav]] || [[word:jagafav|jagafav]] || [[word:shagafav|shagafav]] || [[word:kagafav|kagafav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagafav|shagafav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagafav|goshagafav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagafav|gokishagafav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagafavn眉|shagafavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagafavnkn眉|goshagafavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafavn眉|gokishagafavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagafavsh毛|shagafavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagafavnksh毛|goshagafavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagafavsh毛|gokishagafavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafavro|shagafavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafavnkro|goshagafavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafavro|gokishagafavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafavmu|shagafavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafavnkmu|goshagafavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafavmu|gokishagafavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagafavsher|shagafavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagafavnksher|goshagafavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagafavsher|gokishagafavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagafavng|shagafavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagafavnkng|goshagafavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagafavng|gokishagafavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagafavya|shagafavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagafavnkya|goshagafavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagafavya|gokishagafavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagafavyam|shagafavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagafavnkyam|goshagafavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagafavyam|gokishagafavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagafavn眉sh毛|shagafavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagafavnkn眉sh毛|goshagafavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagafavn眉sh毛|gokishagafavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafavn眉ro|shagafavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafavnkn眉ro|goshagafavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafavn眉ro|gokishagafavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafavn眉mu|shagafavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafavnkn眉mu|goshagafavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafavn眉mu|gokishagafavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagafavsh毛n眉|shagafavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagafavnksh毛n眉|goshagafavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafavsh毛n眉|gokishagafavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafavsh毛ro|shagafavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafavnksh毛ro|goshagafavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafavsh毛ro|gokishagafavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafavsh毛mu|shagafavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafavnksh毛mu|goshagafavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafavsh毛mu|gokishagafavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagafavron眉|shagafavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagafavnkron眉|goshagafavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafavron眉|gokishagafavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagafavrosh毛|shagafavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagafavnkrosh毛|goshagafavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagafavrosh毛|gokishagafavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafavromu|shagafavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafavnkromu|goshagafavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafavromu|gokishagafavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagafavmun眉|shagafavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagafavnkmun眉|goshagafavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafavmun眉|gokishagafavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagafavmush毛|shagafavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagafavnkmush毛|goshagafavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagafavmush毛|gokishagafavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafavmuro|shagafavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafavnkmuro|goshagafavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafavmuro|gokishagafavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
